nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Talaud kingfisher
nodes.summary: The Talaud kingfisher (Todiramphus enigma) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is endemic to the Talaud Islands north of Sulawesi in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and rivers. It is threatened by habitat loss, but as of 2016, the population was considered stable. References

nodes.name: Todiramphus
nodes.summary: Todiramphus（Todiramphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Blue-black kingfisher、Rufous-lored kingfisher、Blue-and-white kingfisher等27种鸟类。
